utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package, all 7 appear. Now check full specification: 
- destination: Provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – fully specified.
- travel_dates: Provided (October 15-19, 2024) – dates specified; note 5 days implies 4 nights, but still specified.
- transportation: Flight details with costs – airline given (“Budget Airline Economy”) and cost range (€110-€125). Lacks flight numbers/times but the format only requires flight details with costs; minimally acceptable.
- accommodation: Hotel selection with costs – type “Eco Lodge” and cost €450 (5 nights). No specific hotel name; the format says hotel selection with costs; “Eco Lodge” is vague but counts as a selection. Acceptable though borderline.
- activities: Selected activities with costs – activities listed (hiking, locations) and a tours_cost €50. Some activities lack individual pricing, but there is at least one cost; format requires activities with costs; acceptable.
- additional_services: Extra services with costs – travel insurance €70, local transportation €100, food €175 – fully specified.
- total_budget: “€850” – provided, but not a complete cost breakdown itemized; however, individual costs are listed above and the total is given; acceptable as total_budget field.
All 7 items are present and minimally fulfill the required details.
